'''Obron Mettlo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Moorin]] who worked as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] and [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After hiring on with [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]], he was fed to [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|the rancor]] as punishment for killing two of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] other hirelings.

==Biography==
Mettlo was, if his own statements were accurate, a veteran of dozens of battles, during most of which he fought on the winning side. He arrived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] around [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], and began to search for work within [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].

Soon afterward, while the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] spy [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]] sat in the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]], he overheard two [[Human/Legends|Human]] criminals in the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] trying to hire Mettlo to help rob another bar on the other side of town. Mettlo, whether because he was annoyed by the poor grasp of his native tongue displayed by his prospective employers, or because he considered a simple robbery beneath a professional like himself, declined the offer. Kardue'sai'Malloc later recommended Mettlo to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], noting that despite the Moorin's bad attitude, he was an intelligent, experienced professional.

Unfortunately for Kardue'sai'Malloc, Mettlo's service to Jabba was short-lived. Soon after getting into a fight and killing two of Jabba's other henchmen, Mettlo was fed to [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|Jabba's rancor]]. It was also rumored that Mettlo had been hired as an assassin by Jabba's rival, [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]], and that he had been ordered to infiltrate Jabba's court to kill the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] kingpin. Kardue'sai'Malloc had to give Jabba free information on Lady Valarian's upcoming wedding in order to make up for his error, and escape being eaten himself.
